case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. HUI YE ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YE, HUI $3,857.03 PRINCIPAL, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,142.03, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $3,857.02 (TRANSACTION ID # 200017218) AS TO DEFENDANT YE, HUI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 78476183) FILED BY ATTORNEY COOK, JORDAN D
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
